headline: Not April Fool's, RH Is Too Cheap To Ignore
summary: Discover why the market may be mispricing RH, with free cash flow set to surge, debt shifting to equity and potential multiple expansion. Read my RH stock analysis.

headline: RH Q4 Earnings Lag Estimates, Revenues Up Y/Y, Stock Down 17%
summary: RH stock plunged 17% after Q4 misses, can revenue growth and long-term investments offset tariff, margin and demand pressures ahead?
